why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet table assigns minecraft:clear_titles to packet id 0x0e, and the official ClientboundClearTitlesPacket(boolean) fixture encodes a context-free resetTimes boolean body through the official STREAM_CODEC. Stevenarella must expose a packet variant, dispatch that official id, decode the official boolean body, preserve resetTimes=true, and fully consume the bytes for packet-support evidence.
what: The exact Rust oracle test failed to compile because steven_protocol::protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayClearTitlesClientbound variant, so Stevenarella cannot currently dispatch the official Play clientbound clear_titles packet id/body.

evidence.observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayClearTitlesClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
